creator: mikael@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 151696
disable clang integrated assembler for armv6

clang enabled the integrated assembler by default and it breaks the build of ffmpeg.

The attached patch fixes that.

failure build log:
http://chips.ysv.freebsd.org/data/11armv6-11armv6/2015-01-14_04h52m20s/logs/errors/ffmpeg-2.3.6,1.log
